Class CycleDAO

java.lang.Object
Database.CycleDAO
public class CycleDAO extends Object
Data Access Object for budget cycle persistence.

Provides methods to save and retrieve budget cycles and their associated expenses from the SQLite database.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CycleDAO()
    Constructs a new CycleDAO for budget cycle persistence.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Expense>
    getExpensesByCycle(int cycleId, String userPin)
    Returns all Expense records that belong to the specified cycle and user.

    Retrieves the most recent budget cycle saved for the specified user.

  • Constructor Details

    • CycleDAO

      public CycleDAO()
      Constructs a new CycleDAO for budget cycle persistence.

  • Method Details

    • getExpensesByCycle

      public List<Expense> getExpensesByCycle(int cycleId, String userPin)
      Returns all Expense records that belong to the specified cycle and user.
      Parameters:
      cycleId - the budget cycle ID
      userPin - the user's PIN that owns the cycle
      Returns:
      the list of expenses for the cycle; empty list if none found

    • saveNewCycle

      public boolean saveNewCycle(BudgetCycle cycle, String userPin)
      Saves a new budget cycle for the given user and assigns the generated cycle ID to the BudgetCycle instance.
      Parameters:
      cycle - the budget cycle to persist
      userPin - the user's PIN associated with the cycle
      Returns:
      true if the cycle was saved successfully; false otherwise

    • getLastSavedCycle

      public BudgetCycle getLastSavedCycle(String userPin)
      Retrieves the most recent budget cycle saved for the specified user.
      Parameters:
      userPin - the user's PIN whose last cycle should be loaded
      Returns:
      the latest BudgetCycle for the user, or null if none exist
